Slot Game Developer

  • Fixed price
  • Intermediate
  • Est. budget: $1,500.00

We are looking for an experienced slot game developer for a wholesale project involving full integration with Stake Engine and strict compliance with platform requirements. All project details and the full technical specification will be shared in private messages. Conditions: • Fixed price: 1500 USD per order • Deadline: 2 weeks • Bonus if the game receives a 3-star rating • Long-term cooperation opportunity for the right candidate If you have proven experience in slot development, RGS integration, and mathematical validation, we look forward to your proposal.please remove any double dashes everywhere.

Posted 2 months ago

Mobile Game Developer Needed for Innovative, Realistic Baseball Game (iOS & Android)

  • Hourly: $25.00 - $43.00
  • Expert
  • Est. time: 3 to 6 months, 30+ hrs/week

I’m looking for an experienced mobile game developer (or small team) to help build a next-generation baseball game inspired by MLB, but not a copy of existing baseball titles. The goal is to create a highly realistic, immersive baseball experience with modern gameplay mechanics, strong visuals, and long-term engagement. This is not an arcade-only game; realism, physics, player behavior, and progression matter a lot. The game will be released on iOS and Android, and must be optimized for mobile performance without sacrificing quality. Core Vision 1. Realistic baseball gameplay (pitching, batting, fielding, physics-based interactions) 2. Smooth controls designed specifically for mobile users 3.High-quality visuals (realistic or semi-realistic style) 4. Career mode, progression systems, and competitive elements 5. Online features such as PvP, leaderboards, or seasonal events Innovation & Optional Blockchain Integration 1. I’m also open to blockchain integration, if it genuinely adds value (not just for hype). For example: 2. Players owning in-game items like bats, uniforms, gloves, or cosmetics 3. Limited-edition gear or collectibles 4. Marketplace functionality (buy/sell/trade items) 5. Optional wallet integration (kept simple for non-crypto users) Blockchain experience is a plus, not a requirement, gameplay always comes first. What I’m Looking For 1. Strong experience in mobile game development 2. Ability to design realistic sports mechanics 3. Knowledge of performance optimization for iOS & Android 4. Experience with multiplayer systems (real-time or async) 5. Someone who can contribute ideas, not just execute instructions If you’ve worked on sports games, simulation games, or multiplayer mobile titles, that’s a big plus. Project Scope 1. Full game development (or major portions of it) 2. Long-term collaboration possible 3. Flexible budget based on experience and quality Please include: 1. Examples of games you’ve worked on (especially sports or simulation) 2. Your role in those projects 3. Your thoughts on what would make a baseball game truly stand out on mobile

Posted 4 weeks ago

Unity Developer for MMO Strategy Game (Reskin & Localization)

  • Hourly
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week

Hi, I am looking for an experienced Unity Game Developer to help me launch a mobile strategy game (MMO/RTS) similar to "Clash of Kings" or "Call of War". Project Overview: I intend to use a ready-made source code/template (bought from Asset Store or provided by you). I need you to customize it for the Kurdish market. Key Responsibilities: Reskinning: Replace UI elements, backgrounds, and character assets to match a specific local theme (I will provide details). Localization (Important): Implement the Kurdish language. Please note that Kurdish (Sorani) uses the Arabic script, which is Right-To-Left (RTL). Experience with RTL text in Unity (Text Mesh Pro) is required. Server Setup: Set up the backend/server so the multiplayer features work correctly. Requirements: Experience with Unity 3D & C#. Previous work on Strategy or Multiplayer games. Ability to work with RTL languages. If you have a portfolio of similar games, please share it.

Posted 2 weeks ago

Roblox Lua Developer for Restaurant Simulation Game

  • Hourly: $10.00 - $15.00
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week

I’m working on a Roblox restaurant game where players start in basic roles like dishwasher or server and work their way up to higher positions like chef. I’m looking for someone who’s comfortable in Roblox Studio and Lua to help build out the main systems. For the first phase, I mainly need help with: - A progression system (XP, leveling, promotions) - Cooking mechanics (timing, heat, basic interactions) - NPC customers (taking orders, waiting, simple reactions) - Some basic UI to show feedback to the player To start, I’d like to do a small paid test task — something simple like a dishwashing system with interaction, a short mechanic, and XP reward, just to see how we work together. If that goes well, I’m planning to continue into a larger project with multiple milestones and ongoing work. I’m mainly looking for someone who communicates well, keeps things clean, and can build systems that actually feel good to use. I’ll be organizing everything on my end and we’ll go step-by-step so it stays smooth. Let me know if you’re interested 👍

Multiplayer Board Game AI Developer in C#/Unity

  • Hourly
  • Expert
  • Est. time: 1 to 3 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

We are seeking an experienced developer to create AI for a large multiplayer board game using C# (and Unity). The ideal candidate should have a solid understanding of game design principles and the ability to implement complex AI algorithms that will enhance player interaction and game dynamics. Move timing order can be either turn-based or time-based.. If you are passionate about gaming and have the technical skills to bring our vision to life, we would love to hear from you!

Roblox Game MVP Development with GDD

  • Hourly: $5.00 - $10.00
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week

Game development is the future. I am building games within an Indian context on global platforms to build games that appeal to Indian audiences. We are seeking a skilled Roblox game developer to help build a minimum viable product (MVP) based on a fully developed game design document (GDD). The ideal candidate will have some experience in game development and design, preferably within the Roblox platform. I am looking for a budding game developer with some skills in Roblox creator studio but not fully formed because coding will mostly be with AI but creative thinking is necessary. I will support with claude code access to inrcease speed of development.

Posted 5 days ago

2D Game Artist Needed for Mobile City-Builder + Unity Development Consultation

  • Fixed price
  • Intermediate
  • Est. budget: $2,000.00

Hello! I am currently developing a 2D mobile city-building game using Unity and I am looking for a freelancer who can help with game art as well as provide consultation on the programming side of the project. The game takes place in a post-environmental-collapse world, where players manage the last surviving city on Earth inside a protective dome. The goal of the player is to grow the city while balancing economic development, citizen happiness, and environmental sustainability. As the game progresses, players will unlock eco-technologies and eventually work to restore the toxic land outside the dome. What I Need Help With 1. 2D Game Art I am looking for a clean, stylized art style suitable for a mobile strategy/city-building game. Assets may include: Buildings (farms, factories, solar panels, water facilities, warehouses, etc.) Roads and environment tiles UI icons and elements Simple NPC characters Basic animation frames if possible 2. Unity Development Consultation While I will be working on the project in Unity, I would like guidance on: Structuring the game systems Implementing city-building mechanics Resource and pollution systems Best practices for mobile optimization This does not necessarily require full programming development, but someone who can help guide the technical side of the project. Game Inspiration The gameplay is inspired by city-building and strategy games such as: SimCity Pocket City However, the main focus of this game is sustainability and environmental decision-making. Preferred Skills Experience creating 2D assets for mobile games Familiarity with Unity Experience with city-building or simulation games is a plus Ability to communicate ideas and collaborate during development If you are interested, please share: Your portfolio or previous game art work Any experience you have with Unity or game systems Your estimated rates for this type of work I look forward to working with someone who is excited about building a meaningful and engaging game together!
